item.title: 曝折叠屏 iPhone 采用单挖孔外屏，支持指纹识别
item.guid: 曝折叠屏-iPhone-采用单挖孔外屏，支持指纹识别
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple's first foldable iPhone will feature an internal screen close to the size of an iPad mini, and will introduce an iPad-like interface layout on the iPhone for the first time, including a sidebar and dual-app side-by-side display functionality, with a planned release in the fall of this year. 据彭博社报道，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 将配备接近 iPad mini 尺寸的内屏，并首次在 iPhone 上引入类似 iPad 的界面布局，包括侧边栏与双应用并排显示功能，计划在今年秋季发布。

In terms of design, the new device will feature a single punch-hole front camera , instead of the current Dynamic Island form. As the front panel thickness is insufficient to accommodate Face ID, Apple will switch to a side-mounted Touch ID. A similar punch-hole solution will also be used in the touch-enabled MacBook Pro to be released later this year. 外观设计方面，新机将采用 单挖孔前摄 ，而非目前的灵动岛形态。由于前面板厚度不足以容纳 Face ID，苹果将改用侧边 Touch ID。类似的挖孔方案也将用于今年稍晚推出的触控版 MacBook Pro。

The report indicates that the new device's external screen size will be similar to a smaller iPhone, while the internal screen will adopt a "wider aspect ratio" to address the common issue of "internal screens being too narrow" in current foldable phones. Apple is also using new display technology to reduce creases, but they cannot be completely eliminated. 报道指出，新机外屏尺寸接近小尺寸 iPhone，内屏采用「更宽的屏幕比例」，旨在改善当前折叠屏手机普遍存在的「内屏过窄」问题。苹果同时采用新型显示技术以减轻折痕，但折痕仍无法完全消除。

It is worth noting that although the foldable iPhone can run two apps side-by-side in the unfolded state, it still cannot open multiple windows like an iPad, nor can it directly run existing iPad apps. 值得注意的是，尽管折叠屏 iPhone 可在展开状态下并排运行两个应用，但仍无法像 iPad 那样开启多窗口，也无法直接运行现有 iPad 应用。

In terms of the imaging system, the foldable iPhone has two rear cameras, one less than the current iPhone Pro; the inner screen's front camera was tested with an under-display solution, but it was abandoned due to poor image quality. 影像系统方面，折叠屏 iPhone 后置两颗摄像头，比当前的 iPhone Pro 少一颗；内屏前摄曾测试过屏下方案，但因画质不佳被放弃。

The report states that durability is Apple's main selling point this time. Apple hopes to improve the opening and closing lifespan of the hinge and screen to address the common reliability issues of foldable devices. 报道称，耐用性是苹果本次的主打卖点。苹果希望提升铰链与屏幕的开合寿命，以解决折叠设备普遍存在的可靠性问题。

In terms of price, the new device is expected to be priced at around US$2,000 (approximately RMB 14,000). 价格方面，新机预计定价约 2000 美元（约合人民币 1.4 万元）。

item.title: 福布斯发布年度全球亿万富豪榜：马斯克蝉联榜首
item.guid: 福布斯发布年度全球亿万富豪榜：马斯克蝉联榜首
item.description:
Yesterday, Forbes released its 40th annual "World's Billionaires List," and Elon Musk retained his title as the world's richest person. 昨天，《福布斯》发布第 40 届年度《全球亿万富豪榜》，埃隆·马斯克蝉联全球首富。

    Elon Musk, head of Tesla and SpaceX, retained his title as the world's richest person for the second consecutive year, with a net worth of approximately US$839 billion, becoming the wealthiest individual recorded in human history and the first to break the US$800 billion wealth threshold;

    Google co-founder Larry Page ranked second with US$257 billion, and Sergey Brin ranked third with US$237 billion;

    Amazon founder Jeff Bezos ranked fourth with US$224 billion;

    Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg ranked fifth with US$222 billion.

    ByteDance founder Zhang Yiming ranked 26th globally with US$69.3 billion;

    Ma Huateng ranked 33rd with US$53.8 billion;

    CATL founder Robin Zeng ranked 34th with US$53.2 billion.

In addition, Binance founder Changpeng Zhao ranked 17th globally with US$110 billion, making him the biggest winner in the cryptocurrency sector on this year's list. Forbes specifically noted that his wealth has surpassed Bill Gates. 此外，币安 (Binance) 创始人赵长鹏（Changpeng Zhao）以 1100 亿美元位列全球第 17 名，是今年榜单中加密货币领域的最大赢家，《福布斯》专文指出其财富已超越比尔·盖茨。

This year, a total of 3,428 people made it onto the list, an increase of 400 from last year, setting a new historical high since the list was established in 1987. The total wealth of global billionaires reached US$20.1 trillion, an increase of approximately US$4 trillion from last year's US$16.1 trillion. 今年共有 3428 人登上榜单，较去年增加 400 人，创下 1987 年榜单设立以来的历史新高。全球亿万富豪总财富达到 20.1 万亿美元，较去年的 16.1 万亿美元增加约 4 万亿美元。

This year, 20 individuals broke the US$100 billion wealth threshold, an increase of 5 from last year. This group's total wealth reached US$3.8 trillion, representing only 0.5% of all billionaires but controlling nearly one-fifth of the total billionaire wealth. 今年共有 20 人财富突破千亿美元门槛，较去年增加 5 人，这一群体的总财富达 3.8 万亿美元，仅占全部亿万富豪人数 0.5% 的群体，却掌握着近五分之一的亿万富豪财富总量。

The United States continues to rank first globally with 989 billionaires and a total wealth of US$8.4 trillion, with 15 of the top 20 on the list coming from the US. Mainland China ranks second with 539 people, and India ranks third with 229 people. 美国以 989 位亿万富豪继续位居全球第一，总财富达 8.4 万亿美元，榜单前 20 名中有 15 人来自美国。中国大陆以 539 人排名第二，印度以 229 人位列第三。

This year, 390 new billionaires joined the list, including singer Beyoncé, tennis legend Roger Federer, Dr. Dre, and Elon Musk's brother Kimbal Musk, among others. Meanwhile, 89 people dropped off the list, and another 39 billionaires passed away in the past year. 今年共有 390 名新上榜富豪，包括歌手碧昂丝、网球传奇罗杰·费德勒、Dr. Dre，以及马斯克之兄 Kimbal Musk 等。与此同时，有 89 人跌出榜单，另有 39 名亿万富豪在过去一年离世。

item.title: 🦞 想了解如何科学「养虾」，来 AIDONE 3.0 准没错
item.guid: 🦞-想了解如何科学「养虾」，来-AIDONE-3.0-准没错
item.description:
The wildest thing in the AI community recently is that a group of people have quietly used that 🦞 AI to turn themselves into "one-person companies" 🤩! 最近 AI 圈最野的事，就是一群人悄悄用那个 🦞 AI，把自己变成了「一人公司」🤩！

Therefore, APPSO and Future Society decided to team up with "super individual" @AI Maverick Frank to bring together these hidden "shrimp farmers" and present the third AIDONE event with the theme "Lobster Club"! 于是 APPSO 与未来社决定，联合「超级个体」@AI 异类弗兰克，把这些深藏不露的「养虾人」拉到一起，给大家带来以「龙虾会」为主题的第三期 AIDONE 活动！

In the previous two AIDONE sessions, we learned about the clever uses of AI and how to get started with Vibe Coding. This time, following the "shrimp farmers'" thinking, let's explore the efficient and interesting new ways to play with OpenClaw, and even hear an open mic session for complaints about 🦞! 前两次 AIDONE 我们了解了 AI 的巧用、如何上手 Vibe Coding，那么这次我们跟随「养虾人」的思路，一起看看 OpenClaw 都有哪些高效、有趣的新玩法，甚至还能听到对 🦞 的吐槽开放麦！

If you're interested in OpenClaw, the internet-famous 🦞, then you absolutely cannot miss this "lobster feast"! 只要你对 OpenClaw 这只火遍全网的 🦞 感兴趣，这场「龙虾盛宴」就绝不能错过！

We are also simultaneously recruiting more "shrimp farmers" to hear more about the joys and complaints of using 🦞! 我们也在同步招募更多「养虾人」，听到更多用 🦞 的欢乐与吐槽！

Enough talk! Quickly click the image below to sign up! 👇 不说多了！赶快点击下方图片报名参加吧！👇

item.title: 苹果最便宜笔记本开售，国补后跌破 4000 元
item.guid: 苹果最便宜笔记本开售，国补后跌破-4000-元
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple officially launched two new products, the iPhone 17e and MacBook Neo. With the national subsidy policy, their prices both fell below 4000 yuan for the first time, setting a new price floor for Apple in the Chinese market. 昨天，苹果正式开售 iPhone 17e 与 MacBook Neo 两款新品，在国家补贴政策叠加后售价均首次跌破 4000 元，刷新了苹果在中国市场的价格下限。

A staff member at an Apple store in downtown Shanghai told Yicai that the official price of the MacBook Neo is 4599 yuan. After the national subsidy, it's equivalent to an 85% discount, bringing the actual price down to just 3909 yuan. 上海市中心一家苹果店店员向第一财经介绍称，MacBook Neo 官方定价为 4599 元，国补后相当于再打 85 折，实际到手价仅 3909 元。

item.title: 追觅首曝「芯际穿越」：旗舰处理器、太空算力中心
item.guid: 追觅首曝「芯际穿越」：旗舰处理器、太空算力中心
item.description:
At yesterday's AWE2026 Chip Industry Summit Forum, "Interstellar Traverse," the chip enterprise under Dreame Technology, announced the latest progress of its multiple core business lines, covering flagship mobile processors, autonomous driving chips, general-purpose robot SoCs, and the layout of space computing centers. 在昨天的 AWE2026 芯片产业高峰论坛上，追觅科技旗下芯片企业「芯际穿越」公布了其多条核心业务线的最新进展，涵盖旗舰手机处理器、自动驾驶芯片、泛机器人 SoC 以及太空算力中心布局。

Interstellar Traverse announced that its "Tianqiong" series chips have officially achieved mass production and will be first integrated into Dreame's general-purpose robot products. This series is positioned as an SoC with a high level of industry integration, adopting a heterogeneous platform with multi-core CPUs, dedicated NPUs, and independent MCUs. It supports lidar and AI vision fusion perception, possesses binocular obstacle avoidance capabilities, and primarily addresses navigation and obstacle avoidance needs in home environments. 芯际穿越宣布「天穹」系列芯片已正式实现规模化量产，将率先搭载于追觅泛机器人产品中。该系列定位为行业集成度较高的 SoC，采用多核 CPU、专用 NPU 与独立 MCU 的异构平台，支持激光雷达与 AI 视觉融合感知，并具备双目避障能力，主要面向家庭场景的导航与避障需求。

In addition to robot chips, Interstellar Traverse also disclosed several self-developed processor plans, including: 除机器人芯片外，芯际穿越还披露多项自研处理器规划，包括：

    Flagship mobile processor "Chixiao 01," featuring a self-developed NPU architecture, with AI equivalent computing power reaching 200 TOPS, emphasizing energy efficiency;

    "Cockpit-driving integrated" chip for L4 autonomous driving, utilizing a 2-nanometer advanced process, with single-chip computing power up to 2000 TOPS, and claiming industry-leading performance in terms of computing power-to-power consumption ratio;

    "Personal Super AI Computer" for personal computing, claimed to provide 1.5 PFLOPS level computing power and support multi-device interconnected networking.

In the direction of space computing, Interstellar Traverse plans to launch the "Yaotai" series of space computing boxes this month, initiating the construction of a low-Earth orbit computing center. 太空算力方向，芯际穿越计划于本月发射「瑶台」系列太空算力盒，启动近地轨道算力中心建设。

According to its plan, the center will eventually consist of approximately 2 million computing satellites, aiming to achieve industry-leading levels in reliability, lifespan, and stability. Interstellar Traverse believes that as ground data centers face increasing limitations in energy consumption, heat dissipation, and site selection, sending computing power into space may become a viable path for the next stage. 根据其规划，该中心未来将由约 200 万颗算力卫星组成，目标在可靠性、寿命与稳定性方面达到行业领先水平。芯际穿越认为，随着地面数据中心在能耗、散热与选址上的限制愈发突出，将算力送入太空可能成为下一阶段的可行路径。

item.title: 苏州发布 OpenClaw 理性应用倡议：不制造焦虑，不鼓吹神话
item.guid: 苏州发布-OpenClaw-理性应用倡议：不制造焦虑，不鼓吹神话
item.description:
Yesterday, the Suzhou Artificial Intelligence Industry Association issued a red-headed document titled "Initiative on Promoting the Rational Application of OpenClaw," covering five aspects: returning to rational understanding, clarifying application boundaries, adhering to scenario-driven approaches, strengthening security and compliance, and fostering a healthy ecosystem. 昨天，苏州市人工智能行业协会发布红头文件「关于推动 OpenClaw 理性应用的倡议书」，内容涵盖五个方面：回归理性认知、明确适用边界、坚持场景驱动、强化安全合规，以及营造健康生态。

It specifically pointed out that the current industry suffers from excessive hype and blind following, calling on industry media, platform enterprises, and training institutions to rationally guide expectations, objectively demonstrate technological capabilities and limitations, and "neither create anxiety nor propagate myths." 其中特别点出，当前行业存在过度炒作、盲目跟风现象，呼吁行业媒体、平台企业、培训机构理性引导预期，客观展示技术能力与局限，「不制造焦虑、不鼓吹神话」。

Previously, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's National Vulnerability Database (NVDB) had issued a warning regarding the security risks of OpenClaw open-source AI agents; both Shenzhen Longgang District and Wuxi High-tech Zone have released draft opinions supporting the development of OpenClaw and OPC. Suzhou City has also proposed the goal of building an "OPC preferred city for entrepreneurship." 此前，工业和信息化部网络安全威胁和漏洞信息共享平台（NVDB）已就 OpenClaw 开源 AI 智能体安全风险发布预警提示；深圳龙岗区、无锡高新区均已发布支持 OpenClaw 与 OPC 发展的相关征求意见稿。苏州市层面亦已提出打造「OPC 创业首选城市」的目标。

🔗 Related reading: 🦞From beginner to uninstallation: The most detailed guide to safely raising lobsters on the entire network 🔗 相关阅读： 🦞从入门到卸载，全网最细的安全养龙虾指南

item.title: 鸿蒙设备也吃上「龙虾」了：小艺 Claw 正式亮相，何刚亲测「很惊喜」
item.guid: 鸿蒙设备也吃上「龙虾」了：小艺-Claw-正式亮相，何刚亲测「很惊喜」
item.description:
Yesterday, He Gang, CEO of Huawei Consumer BG, posted a screenshot on Weibo, showcasing "Xiaoyi Claw" on a Huawei HarmonyOS phone, and commented, "Very pleasantly surprised, quite useful, it can help me get a lot done!" 昨日，华为终端 BG CEO 何刚在微博晒出截图，展示了华为鸿蒙手机上的「小艺 Claw」，并表示「很惊喜，挺好用的，能帮我干不少事儿！」

The screenshot released by He Gang shows that Xiaoyi Claw is positioned as a 7x24-hour all-weather personal exclusive intelligent agent, supporting productivity tasks such as document editing, PPT creation, and automatic email replies. 何刚公开的截图显示，小艺 Claw 定位为 7×24 小时全天候的个人专属智能体，支持文档编辑、制作 PPT、自动回复邮件等生产力任务。

Xiaoyi Claw also features a built-in personality selection system, where different personalities come with different pre-set Skills combinations, and users can also go to the Skills market to download and install other skills themselves. Currently, this product is in beta and supports multi-device collaboration. 小艺 Claw 还内置人格选择系统，不同人格出厂预设不同的 Skills 组合，用户也可以前往 Skills 市场自行下载安装其他技能。 目前该产品处于 beta 版本，支持多端协同。

item.title: 马化腾官宣全系「龙虾」矩阵，「还有一批产品陆续赶来」
item.guid: 马化腾官宣全系「龙虾」矩阵，「还有一批产品陆续赶来」
item.description:
According to Beijing News Shell Finance, Tencent CEO Pony Ma officially announced the company's full "Lobster" product matrix on his WeChat Moments yesterday. He listed various "Lobster" products like "reciting a menu" and finally stated, "there's still a batch of products on their way." 据新京报贝壳财经报道，腾讯 CEO 马化腾昨天在朋友圈官宣公司全系「龙虾」产品矩阵。他像「报菜名」一样列举出各种「龙虾」产品，并在最后表示「还有一批产品赶来」。

Tencent's "Lobster" system has formed a complete matrix covering individual users, developers, and enterprise-level scenarios, with its core revolving around the OpenClaw ecosystem. 腾讯的「龙虾」体系已形成覆盖个人用户、开发者与企业级场景的完整矩阵，核心围绕 OpenClaw 生态展开。

    The full-scenario desktop intelligent agent WorkBuddy is fully compatible with the OpenClaw skill pack, allowing users to perform automated tasks across software without coding knowledge;

    The local AI assistant QClaw, built on OpenClaw, has also started internal testing, allowing "little lobsters" to be deployed on personal computers with one click, without servers or additional IM tool configuration;

    On the developer and enterprise side, Tencent has launched products such as Tencent Cloud Lighthouse, Intelligent Agent Development Platform ADP, and Tencent Cloud Desktop, further improving the cloud deployment and enterprise-level application capabilities of intelligent agents.

After WorkBuddy went online, there was even a surge in access, leading to unstable login and service for CodeBuddy. The official team subsequently urgently expanded capacity 10 times to cope with the traffic pressure. WorkBuddy 上线后甚至出现访问量激增，导致 CodeBuddy 出现登录与服务不稳定，官方随后紧急扩容 10 倍以应对流量压力。

item.title: 英伟达计划 5 年内投 260 亿美元开发开放权重 AI 模型
item.guid: 英伟达计划-5-年内投-260-亿美元开发开放权重-AI-模型
item.description:
According to Wired, Nvidia plans to invest $26 billion over the next five years to develop open-weight AI models and build a complete system covering model research and development, computing infrastructure, talent, and ecosystem. 据《连线》报道，英伟达计划在未来 5 年内投入 260 亿美元，用于开发开放权重 AI 模型，并构建覆盖模型研发、算力基础设施、人才与生态的完整体系。

The report points out that Nvidia's chosen path is not fully open source, but rather an "open-weight" strategy, meaning model parameters are disclosed, but full adherence to open-source protocols is not required. This model sits between OpenAI's closed system and Meta Llama's fully open source approach, better aligning with enterprises' needs for transparency and customizability. 报道指出，英伟达选择的路线并非完全开源，而是采用「开放权重」策略，即公开模型参数，但不必完全遵循开源协议。这一模式介于 OpenAI 的封闭体系与 Meta Llama 的完全开源之间，更贴合企业对透明度与可定制性的需求。

Regarding specific progress, Nvidia has released its strongest open-weight model to date, Nemotron 3 Super, with 128 billion parameters, claiming to surpass OpenAI's GPT-OSS in multiple benchmark tests. The company also revealed that it has completed pre-training a 550 billion-parameter ultra-large model to validate the limits of its next-generation hardware architecture. 在具体进展上，英伟达已发布其迄今最强的开放权重模型 Nemotron 3 Super，参数规模达 1280 亿，并在多个基准测试中声称超越 OpenAI 的 GPT-OSS。公司还透露已完成一个 5500 亿参数超大模型的预训练，用于验证下一代硬件架构的极限。

In contrast, the core models of OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google remain closed-source, offering only cloud access; Meta has also hinted at potentially tightening its open-source strategy in the future. 相比之下，OpenAI、Anthropic 与 Google 的核心模型仍保持闭源，仅提供云端访问；Meta 也暗示未来可能收紧开源策略。

Analysts believe that if it captures 10% of the foundational model market while maintaining its hardware advantage, it could potentially add $50 billion in revenue annually over the next three years. 分析人士认为，若其在保持硬件优势的同时拿下基础模型市场 10% 份额，未来三年每年有望新增 500 亿美元收入。

item.title: 涨幅超 4 倍，腾讯云官宣 AI 模型调价
item.guid: 涨幅超-4-倍，腾讯云官宣-AI-模型调价
item.description:
According to the STAR Market Daily, yesterday, Tencent Cloud's Intelligent Agent Development Platform announced adjustments to the billing strategies for some models: 据《科创板日报》报道，昨日，腾讯云智能体开发平台宣布对部分模型的计费策略进行调整：

    The three models, GLM 5, MiniMax 2.5, and Kimi 2.5, will end their free public beta on March 13th and officially transition to pay-as-you-go commercial services;

    The service prices for the Hunyuan series models Tencent HY2.0 Instruct and Tencent HY2.0 Think have been significantly increased, with input and output prices generally rising by more than 4 times.

Taking Tencent HY2.0 Instruct's input price as an example, it has been adjusted from the original 0.0008 yuan/thousand tokens to 0.004505 yuan/thousand tokens, an increase of up to 463.13%. 以 Tencent HY2.0 Instruct 输入价格为例，由原先的 0.0008 元/千 tokens 调整为 0.004505元/千 tokens，涨幅高达 463.13%。

In fact, Tencent is not the only one raising prices. OpenAI previously increased the input price for GPT-5.4 to $2.5 / million tokens and set the output price at $15 / million tokens; Zhipu AI, on the other hand, raised the GLM Coding Plan subscription price by up to 60%, and API call prices by 67% to 100%. 事实上，涨价的不止腾讯。OpenAI 此前已将 GPT-5.4 输入价格上调至 2.5 美元 / 百万 token，输出价格定为 15 美元 / 百万 token；智谱 AI 则将 GLM Coding Plan 订阅价格提高至多 60%，API 调用价格提升 67% 至 100%。

Behind the price increases, the structural growth in token consumption is the main driving force. Data shows that China's overall daily average token consumption will exceed 30 trillion by mid-2025, and in February this year, the combined daily average token consumption of mainstream large models has reached the 180 trillion level. 涨价背后，Token 消耗的结构性增长是主要驱动力。数据显示，中国整体日均 Token 消耗于 2025 年中突破 30 万亿，今年 2 月主流大模型合计日均 Token 消耗已达 180 万亿级别。

The recently popular open-source AI intelligent agent "Lobster" (OpenClaw) has further accelerated this trend. Just one month after OpenClaw's launch, its token consumption more than quadrupled. According to IDC forecasts, the number of active intelligent agents in China will exceed 350 million by 2031, and intelligent agent token consumption will experience exponential growth of over 30 times annually. 近期爆火的开源 AI 智能体「龙虾」（OpenClaw）进一步加速了这一趋势。OpenClaw 上线仅一个月，Token 消耗量便翻超 4 倍。根据 IDC 预测，中国活跃智能体数量将在 2031 年突破 3.5 亿，智能体 Token 消耗将迎来年均超 30 倍的指数级增长。

Furthermore, according to Yicai, Tencent Cloud mentioned yesterday when responding to "Lobster"-related issues that a screenshot was circulating on social media showing a user incurring high "hidden" fees, totaling over 200 yuan, after installing OpenClaw during a Tencent Cloud public welfare installation event. 另据第一财经报道，腾讯云在昨天回应「龙虾」相关问题时提到，社交平台上流传着一张截图，显示一名用户在腾讯云公益装机活动上安装 OpenClaw 之后出现高额费用「偷跑」，累计 200 多元。

Tencent Cloud responded that, after backend investigation and verification, the 200-plus yuan was the user's previous historical model invocation fees. 腾讯云回应称，经后台排查及核实，这 200 多元是这名用户此前的历史模型调用费用。

OpenClaw installation itself is free, but if large models are called during use, token fees will be incurred. Currently, almost all Agent tools are in a similar situation.

item.title: 小米 YU7 连续 6 个月蝉联 SUV 销冠
item.guid: 小米-YU7-连续-6-个月蝉联-SUV-销冠
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi Auto released sales data, showing that Xiaomi YU7 achieved sales of 20,196 units in February 2026, ranking among the top three in national passenger car sales for that month, and once again securing the monthly sales championship in the mid-to-large SUV segment, a title it has held for 6 consecutive months. 昨天，小米汽车发布销量数据，小米 YU7 在 2026 年 2 月实现销量 20196 辆，位列当月全国乘用车销量前三，并再次夺下中大型 SUV 细分市场月度销冠，已连续 6 个月蝉联。

Lei Jun, founder and chairman of Xiaomi Group, stated in the comments section that YU7's February sales ranked among the top three national passenger car sales "regardless of energy form or model." 小米集团创始人、董事长雷军在评论区表示，YU7 2 月份销量「不论能源形式，不论车型」均位列全国乘用车前三。

item.title: 比亚迪评估进军 F1，70 年历史空白或将打破
item.guid: 比亚迪评估进军-F1，70-年历史空白或将打破
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, BYD is internally evaluating the feasibility of entering top-tier motorsports, with targets including F1 (Formula 1) and the World Endurance Championship (WEC). 据彭博社报道，比亚迪正在内部评估进军顶级赛车运动的可行性，目标包括 F1（一级方程式赛车）以及世界耐力锦标赛（WEC）。

🔗 Related reading: Breaking a 70-year historical void, BYD plans to enter F1 racing 🔗 相关阅读： 打破 70 年历史空白，比亚迪计划进军 F1 赛事

Insiders revealed that BYD is evaluating various participation options, including building its own team or acquiring an existing one. Currently, the Alpine team is looking for equity buyers, and the Aston Martin team is also divesting some equity, both of which are considered potential acquisition targets. 知情人士透露，比亚迪正在评估多种参赛方案，包括自建车队或收购现有车队。目前，Alpine 车队正在寻找股权买家，阿斯顿·马丁车队也在对外出让部分股权，均被视为潜在收购标的。

However, insiders also pointed out that BYD has not yet made a final decision and does not rule out the possibility of ultimately not participating in any races. 不过，知情人士同时指出，比亚迪尚未作出最终决定，也不排除最终不参加任何赛事的可能。

In F1's history spanning over seventy years, a team owned by a Chinese automaker has never appeared on the track. Currently, all 11 teams in the paddock are backed by European and American capital. 在 F1 长达七十余年的历史中，赛场上从未出现过一支由中国车企拥有的车队。目前围场内的 11 支车队，背后皆是欧美资本。

In addition, yesterday BYD officially announced its joining of the International Automotive Task Force (IATF), and will participate in the formulation of international automotive standards together with core vehicle manufacturers such as BMW, Chrysler, Daimler, Fiat, Ford, General Motors, Peugeot Citroën, Renault, and Volkswagen. 此外，昨天比亚迪官宣加入国际汽车工作组（IATF），将与宝马、克莱斯勒、戴姆勒、菲亚特、福特、通用汽车、标致雪铁龙、雷诺、大众等核心整车厂共同参与国际汽车标准的制定。

The IATF was established in 1999 by automotive industry associations from five countries: the United States (AIAG), Italy (ANFIA), France (FIEV), the United Kingdom (SMMT), and Germany (VDA), along with several mainstream vehicle manufacturers. IATF 成立于 1999 年，由来自美国（AIAG）、意大利（ANFIA）、法国（FIEV）、英国（SMMT）和德国（VDA）五个国家的汽车工业协会，以及多家主流整车制造商共同创立。

item.title: 保时捷营业利润暴跌 93%
item.guid: 保时捷营业利润暴跌-93%
item.description:
According to Yicai Global, yesterday Porsche released its financial report for fiscal year 2025, showing a significant decline in performance and core profitability being squeezed by multiple factors. 据第一财经报道，昨天，保时捷公布 2025 财年财报，显示业绩大幅下滑，核心盈利能力受到多重因素挤压。

    Full-year revenue for 2025 was 36.27 billion euros, a year-on-year decrease of 9.5%;

    Operating profit was only 413 million euros, a year-on-year plunge of 92.7%;

    As a long-standing high-profit brand under the Volkswagen Group, Porsche's operating profit in 2024 still reached 5.64 billion euros, with a sales return rate of 14.1%, while this year the indicator plummeted to 1.1%;

    Global deliveries in 2025 were 279,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 10%. Except for the stable North American market, all other core regions experienced declines;

    Full-year sales in the Chinese market were 42,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 26%; sales in the German market were 30,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 16%.

New CEO Michael Leiters stated at the earnings conference that management has completed a systematic analysis of the company's current situation and is advancing the largest strategic and organizational adjustment in the company's history, the "2035 Strategy." 新任 CEO 骆明楷（Michael Leiters）在财报会上表示，管理层已完成对企业现状的系统分析，正在推进公司史上规模最大的战略与组织调整「2035 战略」。

At the product and operational level, Porsche will restore profitability by optimizing its product matrix and strictly controlling costs, including developing coupe and derivative models priced higher than the 911, and extending the lifecycle of internal combustion engine and hybrid products. Concurrently, the company will further streamline its organizational structure and intensify cost-cutting in non-production areas. 在产品与运营层面，保时捷将通过优化产品矩阵、严控成本来修复盈利能力，包括研发定价高于 911 的双门跑车及衍生车型，并延长燃油车与混动产品生命周期。同时，公司将进一步精简组织架构，加大非生产领域的压缩力度。

Regarding market strategy, Leiters stated that due to tariffs, Porsche has raised prices twice in the United States; in the Chinese market, Porsche will not be localized in the future . Chief Financial Officer Bai Yuhan expects that China market sales will further decline to 30,000 units in 2026. 在市场策略上，骆明楷表示，受关税影响，保时捷已在美国两次上调售价； 在中国市场，保时捷未来不会国产 。首席财务官白禹翰预计，2026 年中国市场销量将进一步下滑至 3 万辆。

item.title: 曝 OpenAI 计划将 Sora 并入 ChatGPT
item.guid: 曝-OpenAI-计划将-Sora-并入-ChatGPT
item.description:
According to The Information, OpenAI plans to integrate the capabilities of its AI video generation tool Sora into ChatGPT, due to the cooling popularity of Sora as a standalone application. 据 The Information 报道，OpenAI 计划将旗下 AI 视频生成工具 Sora 的能力整合进 ChatGPT，原因是 Sora 独立应用热度遇冷。

Sora App launched in September last year, with an interface style similar to Douyin, allowing users to create and share AI-generated video content. The app quickly topped the Apple App Store charts shortly after its launch, but its popularity faded quickly, and its current ranking has fallen to 165th. Sora App 于去年 9 月上线，界面风格类似抖音，用户可在其中创建并分享 AI 生成的视频内容。应用上线初期迅速登顶苹果 App Store 榜首，但热度消退较快，目前排名已跌至第 165 位。

Currently, ChatGPT has approximately 920 million weekly active users, still short of OpenAI's previously set goal of 1 billion. Insiders reveal that after the integration is complete, the standalone Sora app will continue to operate. 目前，ChatGPT 的周活跃用户约为 9.2 亿，距离 OpenAI 此前设定的 10 亿目标仍有差距。知情人士透露，整合完成后，Sora 独立应用仍将继续运营。

item.title: 💡 董明珠：奋斗不等于加班，突发情况挺身而出才是最高境界
item.guid: 💡-董明珠：奋斗不等于加班，突发情况挺身而出才是最高境界
item.description:
According to reports from 'China Newsweek,' Gree Electric Appliances Chairwoman Dong Mingzhu stated in an interview yesterday that equating hard work with overtime 'is incorrect, at the very least, it's not right.' 据《中国新闻周刊》报道，格力电器董事长董明珠昨天在接受采访时表示，将奋斗与加班画等号「是不对的，最起码是不正确的」。

She believes that overtime is not necessary under normal working conditions, but when the country has a need, or when the company encounters an emergency, employees should 'step forward without hesitation,' as this is 'the highest realm of humanity.' 她认为，在正常工作状态下并不需要加班，但当国家有需要、或企业遭遇突发情况时，员工应当「义不容辞、挺身而出」，这才是「人的最高境界」。

When asked if she herself works overtime, Dong Mingzhu said: 'Except when I'm sleeping, my mind is always thinking about problems. After all, if you're in this position and don't want to think like this, then don't do it.' 被问及自身是否加班时，董明珠表示：「我除了睡觉，脑子都在想问题，毕竟你在这个位置，如果不想这样，那就别干了。」

When discussing the mental state of young people, Dong Mingzhu also refuted the 'lying flat' narrative. She said that she often interacts with young people who come for interviews, and 'although everyone complains verbally, their actions do not complain,' calling this 'the most positive side.' 在谈及年轻人的精神状态时，董明珠也对「躺平」叙事提出了反驳。她说，自己经常接触来采访的年轻人，「大家虽然嘴上也在抱怨，但是他们的行动并没有抱怨」，并称这是「最阳光的一面」。

She believes that public opinion's portrayal of young people 'lying flat' is misleading, and that real young people are far more vibrant than described by the outside world. 她认为，舆论对年轻人躺平的渲染存在误导，真实的年轻人远比外界描述的更有活力。

First, you have to ask yourself: Can I do it?

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro 或不会搭载缩小版灵动岛
item.guid: iPhone-18-Pro-或不会搭载缩小版灵动岛
item.description:
Yesterday, well-known blogger 'Digital Chat Station' revealed that the iPhone 18 Pro will largely reuse the previous generation's mold, with the overall industrial design and Dynamic Island form factor expected to remain highly consistent with the iPhone 17 Pro, while a smaller Dynamic Island will be reserved for the next generation. 昨天，知名博主「数码闲聊站」发布爆料称，iPhone 18 Pro 将大量复用前代模具，整体工业设计与灵动岛形态预计与 iPhone 17 Pro 保持高度一致，缩小版灵动岛则会留到下一代。

Previously, there were leaks claiming that Apple plans to adopt under-display Face ID flood illuminator components on the iPhone 18 Pro, thereby reducing the Dynamic Island area by approximately 35%, thus increasing the front screen-to-body ratio and improving visual aesthetics. 而此前有爆料称，苹果计划在 iPhone 18 Pro 上采用屏下 Face ID 泛光感应元件，借此将灵动岛面积缩小约 35%，从而提升正面屏占比、改善视觉观感。

item.title: OPPO Find N6 获莱茵「全球最平整折叠屏」认证
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-获莱茵「全球最平整折叠屏」认证
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially unveiled its new generation 'Skyline Architecture' technology, which includes two core technologies: 'new generation titanium alloy Skyline hinge' and 'Skyline memory glass.' The upcoming Find N6, thanks to these technologies, has received TÜV Rheinland's 'World's Flattest Foldable Phone' certification. 昨天，OPPO 正式公布新一代「天穹架构」技术，包含「新一代钛合金天穹铰链」与「天穹记忆玻璃」两项核心技术，即将发布的 Find N6 凭借上述技术获得德国莱茵 TÜV「全球最平整折叠手机」认证。

    The new generation titanium alloy Skyline hinge is crafted using the industry's first chip-level polymer 3D printing technology, employing 2μm ultra-high precision spectral confocal scanning, combined with 5pL-grade polymer 3D printing and millisecond curing full-process technology, compressing the error affecting hinge flatness to within 0.1mm;

    The Skyline memory glass achieves more than 3 times the rigidity of traditional flexible glass and boasts a 99.9% self-repairing restoration rate after bending and unfolding. OPPO states that this glass can maintain stable performance after 600,000 folds, serving as the core guarantee for the screen's 'long-lasting flatness.'

item.title: 百度智能云发布 DuClaw：零部署「养虾」，即开即用
item.guid: 百度智能云发布-DuClaw：零部署「养虾」，即开即用
item.description:
Baidu AI Cloud officially launched its zero-deployment service DuClaw yesterday. It requires no image selection, cloud server deployment, or manual API Key configuration, offering instant use and achieving zero-threshold 'shrimp farming' (referring to easy deployment/management). 百度智能云昨天正式发布零部署服务 DuClaw，无需选择镜像、部署云服务器或自行配置 API Key，即开即用，实现零门槛「养虾」。

At the capability level, DuClaw has built-in Baidu's own Skills such as Baidu Search, Baidu Baike, and Academic Search, and fully supports multiple mainstream large models like DeepSeek and Kimi-K2.5, allowing users to flexibly choose configurations to handle complex tasks. 在能力层面，DuClaw 内置了百度搜索、百科、学术搜索等百度自有 Skills，并全面支持 DeepSeek、Kimi-K2.5 等多款主流大模型，用户可灵活选配以应对复杂任务。

Currently, the DuClaw web service has been officially launched, and will subsequently be integrated with mainstream office applications such as WeChat Work, DingTalk, and Feishu. 目前，DuClaw 网页端服务已正式上线，后续还将陆续接入企业微信、钉钉、飞书等主流办公应用。

item.title: 英特尔推出 Ultra 200S Plus 系列台式机处理器
item.guid: 英特尔推出-Ultra-200S-Plus-系列台式机处理器
item.description:
Yesterday, Intel officially launched its Core Ultra 200S Plus series desktop processors, including the Core Ultra 7 270K Plus and Core Ultra 5 250K Plus. 昨天，英特尔正式推出酷睿 Ultra 200S Plus 系列台式机处理器，包括酷睿 Ultra 7 270K Plus 与酷睿 Ultra 5 250K Plus。

    The Ultra 7 270K Plus features 24 cores (8P+16E), with a geometric mean gaming performance improvement of up to 15% compared to the previous generation.

    The Ultra 5 250K Plus features 18 cores (6P+12E).

The inter-die frequency of both processors is boosted by up to 900 MHz, increasing the connection speed between the CPU and memory controller by nearly 1 GHz, thereby reducing system latency and enhancing gaming performance. 两款处理器的晶粒间频率最高提升 900 MHz，使 CPU 与内存控制器之间的连接速度接近提升 1 GHz，从而降低系统延迟并增强游戏表现。

The series also introduces the Intel Binary Optimization Tool for the first time, which can improve native performance in specific games and further enhance IPC performance through software-layer optimization. 该系列还首次引入英特尔二进制优化技术（Intel Binary Optimization Tool），可在特定游戏中提升原生性能，并通过软件层优化进一步提高 IPC 表现。

The new series also supports DDR5 7200 MT/s memory and is the first to be compatible with 4-Rank CUDIMM modules, with a single module capacity of up to 128 GB, requiring use with specific motherboards based on Intel 800 series chipsets. 新系列还支持 DDR5 7200 MT/s 内存，并率先兼容 4-Rank CUDIMM 模块，单条容量最高可达 128 GB，需搭配基于英特尔 800 系列芯片组的特定主板使用。

item.title: 谢赛宁团队发布全球首个多人视频世界模型 Solaris
item.guid: 谢赛宁团队发布全球首个多人视频世界模型-Solaris
item.description:
Yesterday, the team of Saining Xie, an assistant professor at New York University, released Solaris, the world's first multiplayer video world model, whose technical foundation is Matrix-Game 2.0, open-sourced by Kunlun Tiangong last August. 纽约大学助理教授谢赛宁（Saining Xie）团队昨日发布了全球首个多人视频世界模型 Solaris，其技术底座为昆仑天工于去年 8 月开源的 Matrix-Game 2.0。

Unlike all previous video world models that could only simulate a single-player perspective, Solaris can simultaneously generate first-person views for two players and ensure that both see the same dynamic world: when one player mines or builds in Minecraft, this change is reflected in real-time in the other player's perspective. 与此前所有视频世界模型仅能模拟单人视角不同，Solaris 能够同时生成两名玩家各自的第一人称画面，并确保双方看到的是同一个动态世界：当一名玩家在《我的世界》中挖掘或建造时，这一变化会实时反映在另一名玩家的视角之中。

💻 GitHub: https://solaris-wm.github.io/ 💻 GitHub: https://solaris-wm.github.io/

item.title: 萨莉亚中国新工厂落成：年产意面 1.3 万吨，与日本、澳洲并列核心产能
item.guid: 萨莉亚中国新工厂落成：年产意面-1.3-万吨，与日本、澳洲并列核心产能
item.description:
According to Xiaoshidai, Saizeriya recently held a completion ceremony for its new factory in Guangzhou, attended by several senior executives. Located in Guangzhou's Huangpu District, the factory is an expansion and capital increase project for the original Guangzhou factory, with an investment exceeding 200 million yuan, and will have an annual output of 4,500 tons of pizza, 12,000 tons of seasoning sauce, and 13,000 tons of pasta. 据小食代报道，萨莉亚近日在广州举行新工厂竣工仪式，多位高层出席现场。该工厂位于广州黄埔区，是对原有广州工厂的增资扩产项目，投资超 2 亿元，将年产披萨 4500 吨、调味酱 12000 吨和意面 13000 吨。

Saizeriya President Hideharu Matsutani once clearly stated that the new factory "aims to increase the number of stores in China to 1,000." According to the company's arrangements, the Guangzhou factory, along with the Australian factory and domestic Japanese factories, are listed as the company's core production bases. 萨莉亚社长松谷秀治曾明确表示，新工厂「着眼于在中国增至 1000 家店铺」。按照公司安排，广州工厂与澳大利亚工厂及日本国内工厂并列为公司核心生产基地。

The Chinese market is already Saizeriya's largest overseas market. 中国市场已是萨莉亚海外业务的第一大市场。

The 2024/25 fiscal year (September 1, 2024, to August 31, 2025) annual report shows that the Chinese mainland market saw a net increase of 82 stores for the year, with a total of 497 stores as of August 31 last year; the Chinese market's operating revenue was 70.961 billion yen (approximately 3.3 billion RMB), a year-on-year increase of 6.3%. 2024/25 财年（2024 年 9 月 1 日至 2025 年 8 月 31 日）年报显示，中国内地市场全年净增门店 82 家，截至去年 8 月 31 日共有 497 家门店；中国市场营业收入为 709.61 亿日元（折合人民币约 33 亿元），同比增长 6.3%。

item.title: lululemon 携手刘易斯·汉密尔顿发布「感受练」主题，迎接 F1 中国大奖赛
item.guid: lululemon-携手刘易斯·汉密尔顿发布「感受练」主题，迎接-F1-中国大奖赛
item.description:
With the F1 Chinese Grand Prix about to begin this year, lululemon brand ambassador and seven-time world champion Lewis Hamilton showcases his preparation from the track to the training ground with the theme "Feel the Practice," emphasizing the importance of focus, endurance, and continuous breakthrough. 今年 F1 中国大奖赛即将开赛，lululemon 品牌大使、七届世界冠军刘易斯·汉密尔顿以「感受练」为主题，展示其从赛道到训练场的备战状态，强调专注、耐力与持续突破的重要性。

The License to Train™ shorts he wears feature wicking, quick-drying fabric designed for hot and humid environments; the Repper™ short-sleeved T-shirt adapts to various scenarios such as equipment, cardio, and strength training with its stretchy fabric and spliced structure; the Chargefeel™ 3 all-around running and training shoes provide lightweight rebound and stable grip, helping him maintain explosiveness and stability during training. 他所穿着的 License to Train™ 运动短裤采用芯吸速干面料，旨在应对湿热环境；Repper™ 运动短袖 T 恤则以弹力面料与拼接结构适配器械、有氧与力量训练等多场景需求；Chargefeel™ 3 综合跑训鞋提供轻盈回弹与稳定抓地表现，辅助其在训练中保持爆发力与稳定性。

item.title: 《奇迹梦之队》发独家艺术海报
item.guid: 《奇迹梦之队》发独家艺术海报
item.description:
Yesterday, the animated film "Miracle Dream Team" released its China exclusive art poster, featuring a warm orange-yellow background. Curry, in his classic No. 30 jersey, and all the star players in the film salute each other with a "goodnight gesture," incorporating an Oriental watercolor style to present a visual expression designed specifically for Chinese audiences. 昨日，动画电影《奇迹梦之队》发布中国独家艺术海报，以暖调橙黄色为背景，库里身着经典 30 号战衣与片中全体明星球员以「晚安礼」手势相互致意，融入东方水彩风格，呈现专为中国观众设计的视觉表达。

The film will officially be released this Saturday (March 14), telling the story of Will, a small but ambitious goat, who breaks into top-tier competitions, confronts formidable opponents, and vows to rewrite the rules of the sport. 影片将于本周六（3 月 14 日）正式上映，故事讲述心怀大志的小个子山羊威尔闯入顶级赛场、对抗猛兽对手、誓要改写运动规则的逐梦故事。

item.title: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片《巨星之路》确认引进
item.guid: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片《巨星之路》确认引进
item.description: "Michael Jackson: The Road to Stardom" has been confirmed for release in mainland China, with the specific date to be determined. It is scheduled to open in North America on April 24 this year. The film stars MJ's nephew Jaafar Jackson in the lead role, with Oscar winner Colman Domingo and others co-starring. 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》已确认引进中国内地，具体档期待定，北美定档今年 4 月 24 日上映。影片由 MJ 的侄子贾法尔·杰克逊出演主角，奥斯卡得主科尔曼·多明戈等人联袂出演。
